title: Check 3: Supplier Existence & Status — Result
description: Output of Check 3. Verifies PR supplier is known, active, and authorized; document supplier matches PR supplier; insurance and certifications current per category. Ref: doc §Check 3.

check_3_status.description: Overall result. WARNING = e.g. certification expired / PO block (3.2.5).

supplier_found.description: Whether supplier was matched in Supplier Master (3.2.1).

matched_vendor_id.description: Vendor OID of matched supplier; null if not found.

supplier_status.description: Status of matched supplier: Active, Blocked, Inactive, Debarred, etc. (3.2.2).

insurance_met.description: Required insurance for category is current; or not required (3.2.4).

insurance_gaps.description: Missing or expired insurance types (3.2.4). Empty if all met or not required.

certifications_met.description: Required certifications for category are current; or none required (3.2.5).

certification_gaps.description: Missing or expired certifications (3.2.5). Empty if all met or not required.

document_supplier_match.description: Attachment supplier matches PR supplier, fuzzy > 80% (3.2.6).

failure_reasons.description: Specific reasons for remediation if FAIL or WARNING.

sub_checks.description: One per rule: 3.2.1 Supplier Match, 3.2.2 Supplier Status Active, 3.2.3 Approved For Entity, 3.2.4 Insurance Covered, 3.2.5 Certifications Current, 3.2.6 Document-PR Supplier Match.

policy_reference.description: e.g. Supplier Master Data Policy, Section 2.1

agent_recommendation.description: Recommendation when FAIL, WARNING, or NEEDS_REVIEW.

example.summary_description: Supplier matched and active, but ISO 27001 certification expired
failure_reasons: Certification expired: ISO 27001 (expired 2025-11-30) — PO block per policy 3.2.5

field_level_assessment.detail: Fuzzy match: CDW Corporation vs CDW Corp
Professional Liability and Cyber Liability current
ISO 27001 expired 2025-11-30; SOC 2 Type II current

example.policy_reference: Supplier Master Data Policy §2.1; Category Insurance §3.3; Category Certifications §3.4
example.agent_recommendation: Supplier ISO 27001 certification has expired. Request updated certificate before issuing PO.
